PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED FEB-05-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RILEY, DANA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RILEY, DANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDS, ROSALIND $1,722.54 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,847.54, PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FRAUDULENT CONDUCT TOWARD THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. "THE DEFENDANT'S CROSS--COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS VENUE IS NOT IN SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IN DEFENDANT'S CROSS--COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED" PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT BOLDS, ROSALIND MAILED TO RESPONDENT RILEY, DANA
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RILEY, DANA AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDS, ROSALIND
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-22-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF FEB.-20-2015 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday 22, 2015 in Department 525:
Dana Riley, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Isis Riley-Talbert.
Rosalind Bolds, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Dana Riley testifies on her own behalf and responds to questions from Judge Grotch. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits not marked - verious phone text messages and bill statements.

Rosalind Bolds testifies on her own behalf and responds to questions from Judge Grotch.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to Ms. Riley by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk Jean Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed
